title: Time-Critical Intervention Delayed Beyond Admissible Threshold
scenario: A time-critical intervention is authorized, but execution is delayed beyond the clinically admissible threshold.
initial_state: The intervention was admissible within the required response interval.
state_transition: The response interval elapsed before execution.
execution_boundary: The intervention is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Time-critical execution requires current temporal admissibility at the execution boundary.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the delay broke the temporal condition supporting authorization.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when a time-critical action exceeds its admissible threshold.
